headline: Netflix's 'Survival of the Thickest' Wraps Final Season with Sykes-Powered Finale
lede: Michelle Buteau's boundary-pushing comedy series closes its Netflix run with star power and comic gravitas this summer.
body:
Netflix's provocative comedy series *Survival of the Thickest* will conclude its run on July 2, marking comedian Michelle Buteau's final bow on the streaming platform.

The third season promises a blowout finish, complete with a surprise guest appearance by comedy legend Wanda Sykes. Buteau unveiled the season's first teaser during her Netflix is a Joke stand-up performance, electrifying fans with a glimpse of the show's final chapter.

Sykes' guest role signals a high-profile sendoff for the series, which has consistently pushed boundaries around body positivity and intersectional storytelling. The comedian's involvement suggests the finale will maintain the show's trademark blend of sharp social commentary and laugh-out-loud humor.

Buteau, who created and stars in the series, has transformed her personal stand-up material into a nuanced exploration of contemporary identity and relationships. Her performance has earned critical praise for its authenticity and fearless approach to representing diverse experiences.

Netflix's decision to conclude the series after three seasons reflects the platform's increasingly strategic approach to comedy programming, prioritizing focused, impactful storytelling over extended runs.
key_facts: Third and final season premieres July 2
Wanda Sykes guest stars in finale
Created and starred by Michelle Buteau
